pi_items.source: ASP.NET Core MVC standard scaffolding documentation which pluralizes model names (WarehouseAsset -> WarehouseAssets) and appends 'Controller'.
ASP.NET Core MVC standard scaffolding documentation for Entity Framework CRUD operations which generates these 5 views.

privileged_info_summary: The task relies on standard ASP.NET Core MVC scaffolding behavior for a synthetic model called WarehouseAsset. It is verified via Microsoft documentation that the default controller generated will be WarehouseAssetsController.cs, and the scaffolding engine will generate exactly five CRUD views: Create.cshtml, Delete.cshtml, Details.cshtml, Edit.cshtml, and Index.cshtml.
